name: Curried Vidalia Onion Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, curry powder, salt.
2. In another bowl, beat the egg and vinegar. Add the hot sauce.
3. Pour the egg mixture over the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
4. Add the sliced onions and stir until all the onion pieces are coated with batter.
5. Let the batter stand for 1 hour to allow flavors to meld.
6. Heat vegetable oil in a large saucepan or deep skillet to 350°F (175°C) over medium heat.
7. Using a tablespoon, drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil. Be careful not to overcrowd the pan.
8. Fry until golden brown on one side, then flip and fry until golden brown all over.
9. Remove the fritters with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
10. Test for doneness by opening one; if undercooked in the center, reduce heat slightly and fry another minute until fully cooked.
11. Serve immediately.
